import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import axios from 'axios'; const HomePage = () => { const [collections, setCollections] = useState([]); const [latestProducts, setLatestProducts] = useState([]); const [activeSlide, setActiveSlide] = useState(0); const [showQuickView, setShowQuickView] = useState(false); const [selectedProduct, setSelectedProduct] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { const fetchData = async () => { try { const [collectionsRes, productsRes] = await Promise.all([ axios.get('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/collections'), axios.get('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/products/latest') ]); setCollections(collectionsRes.data); setLatestProducts(productsRes.data); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching data:', error); } }; fetchData(); }, []); return (
{/* Hero Section with Parallax */}
Collect the Extraordinary

Discover our premium collection of die-cast models, where passion meets precision.

Explore Collections
{/* Featured Collections */}

Featured Collections

{collections.slice(0, 3).map((collection) => (

{collection.name}

{collection.description}

View Collection
))}
{/* Latest Products Carousel */}

Latest Arrivals

{latestProducts.map((product) => (

{product.name}

${product.price}

))}
{/* Brand Story */}

Our Story

Since 1995, we've been curating the finest die-cast models for collectors worldwide. Our passion for detail and commitment to quality has made us the leading destination for premium collectible cars.

Learn More
{/* Newsletter */}

Stay Updated

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates about new releases, exclusive offers, and collecting tips.

{/* Quick View Modal */} {showQuickView && selectedProduct && (

{selectedProduct.name}

{selectedProduct.description}

${selectedProduct.price}

View Full Details
)}
); }; export default HomePage;
